commands: vp migrate --hooks --no-interactive # existing Vite+ project: upgrade plus only the git hooks action
git config --local core.hooksPath # hooks configured to .vite-hooks/_
cat .vite-hooks/pre-commit # pre-commit hook runs vp staged
test -f .nvmrc && echo nvmrc-kept # node version file is not migrated without --full
test ! -f .node-version && echo no-node-version # only the hooks action ran
